mapper.insert: insert into courses (title, description, cover_image, price, category_id, level, duration, teacher_id, student_count, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{title}, #{description}, #{coverImage}, #{price}, #{categoryId}, #{level}, #{duration}, #{teacherId}, #{studentCount}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update courses
title = #{title},
description = #{description},
cover_image = #{coverImage},
price = #{price},
category_id = #{categoryId},
level = #{level},
duration = #{duration},
teacher_id = #{teacherId},
student_count = #{studentCount},
status = #{status},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.title, c.description, c.cover_image, c.price, c.category_id, c.level, c.duration, c.teacher_id, c.student_count, c.status, c.create_time, c.update_time, ch.id AS chapter_id, ch.title AS chapter_title, ch.sort AS chapter_sort, ch.create_time AS chapter_create_time, s.id AS section_id, s.title AS section_title, s.video_url AS section_video_url, s.duration AS section_duration, s.is_free AS section_is_free, s.sort AS section_sort, s.create_time AS section_create_time FROM courses c LEFT JOIN chapters ch ON c.id = ch.course_id LEFT JOIN sections s ON ch.id = s.chapter_id WHERE c.id = #{id} ORDER BY ch.sort, s.sort
SELECT users.id FROM sys_user_role sur LEFT JOIN users ON sur.user_id = users.id WHERE sur.role_id = 2
SELECT ch.id FROM chapters ch LEFT JOIN courses c ON ch.course_id = c.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
